heading: Recruitment, retention, relocation incentives, and relocation expenses
label: 9504 Recruitment, retention, relocation incentives, and relocation expenses
notes: Amendments2013—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Before ” for “Before ”.Pub. L. 113–6September 30, 2013July 23, 20132007—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Before ” for “For a period of 10 years after the date of enactment of this section”.Pub. L. 110–161July 23, 2013
amendments: Amendments2013—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Before ” for “Before ”.Pub. L. 113–6September 30, 2013July 23, 20132007—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Before ” for “For a period of 10 years after the date of enactment of this section”.Pub. L. 110–161July 23, 2013

children.label: a
children.text: Before and subject to approval by the Office of Personnel Management, the Secretary of the Treasury may provide for variations from sections 5753 and 5754 governing payment of recruitment, relocation, and retention incentives.September 30, 2013

children.label: b
children.text: Before , the Secretary of the Treasury may pay from appropriations made to the Internal Revenue Service allowable relocation expenses under section 5724a for employees transferred or reemployed and allowable travel and transportation expenses under section 5723 for new appointees, for any new appointee appointed to a position for which pay is fixed under section 9502 or 9503 after .September 30, 2013June 1, 1998
